title: ANC - 2b-Change ANC to Off during call when Transparency is ON before call
scenario: Transparency mode is disabled and ANC turns ON during a call, with post-call mode restoration behavior differing between Emu/Osprey/Tern and Lark/Peregrine devices
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android
Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Ensure Transparency Mode is ON and ANC is OFF
Start or join a call (e.g., via phone dialer or VoIP app)
Observe the Audio Settings screen during the call
Tap the Transparency toggle during the call
Tap the ANC toggle to turn it OFF during the call
Observe the Audio Settings screen after the call ends
expected: Before call: Transparency ON, ANC OFF. During call: ANC turns ON (with previously selected Adaptive or Standard mode), Transparency becomes greyed out/OFF. Tapping Transparency during call shows popup that option is unavailable. Tapping ANC toggle to turn it OFF during call sets ANC to OFF with no selected value. After call ends: On Emu/Osprey/Tern — ANC stays OFF with no selected value, Transparency becomes accessible again but OFF (previous value retained). On Lark/Peregrine — ANC stays OFF with no selected value, Transparency becomes accessible again and ON (previous value retained). User can then toggle between ANC and Transparency modes normally.
